channel.title: Observability on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Observability on cron.umbe.me

item.title: ADK Callbacks: Build Production Observability for AI Agents
item.description: ADK callbacks let you capture token usage, costs, and timing at every LLM call and tool invocation. This guide shows you how to build a complete observability pipeline that routes metrics to Datadog, Prometheus, or OpenTelemetry.

item.title: Build a Goroutine Tracer with eBPF: Real-Time Go Debugging
item.description: Build a zero-overhead goroutine tracer using eBPF uprobes to monitor Go runtime events in production. Integrates with Prometheus and OpenTelemetry for real-time dashboards without modifying application code.
